title: Week of April 6, 2026
summary: This week brought significant stability improvements to OpsPal's core platform. The system now automatically cleans up outdated plugins and resolves missing components during startup, reducing errors and ensuring smoother session launches. Additionally, Salesforce users will experience fewer workflow interruptions thanks to better handling of Dynamic Forms and RecordType assignments.

entries.headline: Platform automatically removes outdated plugins when you start sessions
Improved Salesforce workflow reliability and reduced startup errors
details: Better cleanup of unused data quality tools
Enhanced monitoring for Salesforce architecture and quality checks

entries.headline: Salesforce Dynamic Forms and RecordType management work more reliably
details: Prevents invisible field issues when Dynamic Forms are active
Automatically assigns RecordTypes to System Administrator profiles
Reduces workflow blocking from routing conflicts

entries.headline: Platform automatically installs missing components and reports issues clearly
details: Detects and fixes missing dependencies during session startup
Provides clear error messages and suggested fixes when problems occur

entries.headline: Eliminated false error messages about missing components during startup
